data.title: Add Role Constraints section to doc-writer.md and update 4-tier schema
data.description:
testing_mode: GREEN

Implements doc-writer.md changes to satisfy done definitions 1-4 of story 50d5-ac2e. Depends on T1 (f4cf-1d33).

Implementation:
1. Insert '## Role Constraints' section into plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md immediately after '## Input Requirements' and BEFORE '## 1. The Bright Line Decision Engine'.
   Content:
   - NEVER-statement first: 'NEVER write dev-team artifacts to plugins/dso/. Dev-team artifacts are project-local work and must be written to project-local directories.'
   - Permitted dirs list: docs/designs/ (UI and architectural design artifacts), docs/findings/ (investigation and research findings), docs/archive/ (deprecated artifacts), tests/ (test files and fixtures)
   - Use EXACTLY the same directory names and NEVER phrasing as CLAUDE.md rule 26 (S3 terminology match required by DD4)
2. Update '## 3. Repository Documentation Schema' to add a 'Dev-Team Artifacts' entry after Tier 4 (or as a new entry in the schema) that names docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/ with brief descriptions of what belongs in each.
3. Remove RED marker [test_doc_writer_has_plugin_boundary_constraint] from .test-index for doc-writer.md entry (test now passes GREEN).
4. Run tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh — ALL assertions must pass.

Acceptance criteria:
- [ ] doc-writer.md has Role Constraints section before The Bright Line Decision Engine
  Verify: awk '/Role Constraints/{found=1} /Bright Line/{if(found) print "OK"; exit}' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md | grep -q OK
- [ ] doc-writer.md Role Constraints contains NEVER + plugins/dso
  Verify: grep -q 'NEVER.*plugins/dso' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md
- [ ] doc-writer.md schema section mentions docs/designs/ docs/findings/ docs/archive/
  Verify: grep -q 'docs/designs' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md && grep -q 'docs/findings' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md && grep -q 'docs/archive' plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md
- [ ] Terminology matches CLAUDE.md rule 26 (docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/ present with NEVER phrasing)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh
- [ ] test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh passes all assertions (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh; echo "exit: $?"
